goal: Add PATCH /admin/support-events/:eventId for safe local/internal support event adjustment controls.
allowedScope: local/internal admin support event adjustment API
doneCriteria: admin support patch requires admin bearer token
admin support patch rejects missing or invalid auth
admin support patch returns 404 for unknown event
admin support patch allows sanitized display name update
admin support patch allows safe moderation status hold to rejected
admin support patch blocks approved to rejected reversal
admin support patch blocks amount_raw and amount_display changes
admin support patch blocks wallet/source/direct affinity changes
admin support patch excludes raw message and raw payload from response
admin support patch writes safe audit log
admin support patch does not duplicate reaction overlay affinity or outbox
